messages.content:
Get job status: deploy-api-1279-heyinan-3-sz7f2:Running:['10.119.0.64']:49163:calling /v1/models
给我一个curl测试命令

根据你提供的信息，这里是一个 curl 测试命令：

```bash
curl -X GET http://10.119.0.64:49163/v1/models
```

如果需要测试具体的模型推理接口，可以使用：

```bash
curl -X POST http://10.119.0.64:49163/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "your-model-name",
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "Hello, how are you?"
      }
    ],
    "max_tokens": 100
  }'
```

或者测试 completions 接口：

```bash
curl -X POST http://10.119.0.64:49163/v1/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "your-model-name",
    "prompt": "Hello, how are you?",
    "max_tokens": 100
  }'
```

**注意：**
- 请根据实际部署的模型名称替换 `your-model-name`
- 如果有认证要求，需要添加相应的 Authorization header
- 确保你的网络可以访问 `10.119.0.64:49163`

根据你提供的信息，这里是测试命令：

```bash
curl -X POST http://10.102.206.26:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-admin" \
  -d '{
    "model": "/mnt/shared-storage-user/large-model-center-share-weights/hf_hub/models--Qwen--Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507/snapshots/56e16a623ffb2855ca901a65166a9170e99df127",
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "你好，请介绍一下你自己"
      }
    ],
    "max_tokens": 200,
    "temperature": 0.7
  }'
```

如果模型路径太长，可以先查看可用模型列表：

```bash
curl http://10.102.206.26:8000/v1/models \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-admin"
```

或者使用简化版本（如果服务支持简短的模型名称）：

```bash
curl -X POST http://10.102.206.26:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-admin" \
  -d '{
    "model": "Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507",
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "你好，请介绍一下你自己"
      }
    ],
    "max_tokens": 200
  }'
```

**流式输出测试：**

```bash
curl -X POST http://10.102.206.26:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-admin" \
  -d '{
    "model": "/mnt/shared-storage-user/large-model-center-share-weights/hf_hub/models--Qwen--Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507/snapshots/56e16a623ffb2855ca901a65166a9170e99df127",
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "你好"
      }
    ],
    "stream": true
  }' \
  --no-buffer
```
